_note: Crucible recipe for Battlemage, grounded in its real boot path. The boot/drive harnesses already EXIST but only run at release time or under FullVerification — the normal per-change gate never launches the real app, which is the 'green but crashes on launch' gap. Wiring this recipe into the change lane closes it. Boot/drive need a GUI session + tauri-driver + a built webview-e2e binary; the trust phase is static and runs anywhere.

build.cmd: npm --prefix frontend run build && cargo build -p battlemage --features webview-e2e
